mapper.sql: from energy_account_order_flow flow inner join purchase_order order_info on order_info.order_sn = flow.consume_id
mapper.select:
select flow.consume_id as orderSn, flow.account_id as accountId, detail.meter_id as meterId, detail.balance_type as balanceType, flow.amount as amount, order_info.service_amount as serviceAmount, flow.begin_balance as beginBalance, flow.end_balance as endBalance, flow.create_time as createTime
inner join order_detail_energy_top_up detail on detail.order_sn = order_info.order_sn and detail.balance_type = flow.balance_type and detail.account_id = flow.account_id and ( (detail.balance_type = 0 and flow.balance_relation_id = detail.account_id) or (detail.balance_type = 1 and flow.balance_relation_id = detail.meter_id) ) where flow.create_time >= #{query.beginTime} and flow.create_time < #{query.endTime} and flow.account_id in
#{accountId}
and flow.amount > 0 and order_info.order_type = #{orderType} and order_info.order_status = #{orderStatus} and order_info.is_deleted = 0 and detail.balance_type = #{meterBalanceType} order by flow.account_id asc, detail.meter_id asc, flow.create_time asc

select flow.consume_id as orderSn, flow.account_id as accountId, flow.balance_relation_id as meterId, flow.balance_type as balanceType, flow.amount as amount, order_info.service_amount as serviceAmount, flow.begin_balance as beginBalance, flow.end_balance as endBalance, flow.create_time as createTime
where flow.create_time >= #{query.beginTime} and flow.create_time < #{query.endTime} and flow.account_id in
#{accountId}
and flow.amount > 0 and order_info.order_type = #{orderType} and order_info.order_status = #{orderStatus} and order_info.is_deleted = 0 order by flow.account_id asc, flow.create_time asc, flow.consume_id asc
